slides.title: What is Machine Learning?
content: Machine Learning is a subset of Artificial Intelligence
Enables computers to learn from data without explicit programming
Uses algorithms to identify patterns and make decisions
Applications: Image recognition, natural language processing, predictions

slides.title: Types of Machine Learning
content: Unsupervised Learning: Finding patterns in unlabeled data
Reinforcement Learning: Learning through trial and error

slides.title: Thank You!
content: "The future belongs to those who learn."
